name: Morgan Stanley Direct Lending Fund
business: Morgan Stanley Direct Lending Fund is a non-diversified, externally managed specialty finance company focused on lending to middle-market companies. It invests primarily in directly originated senior secured term loans issued by U.S. middle-market companies in which private equity sponsors have a controlling equity stake. The company generates revenues primarily in the form of interest income from investments.

exposures.sentence: Evaluation of impact due to implementation of artificial intelligence;

We believe the middle market direct lending market environment continues to be attractive, despite the recent market volatility driven in part by trade policy, uncertainty surrounding the implementation of artificial intelligence, or AI, among other factors.

catalysts.event: Commencement of Capstone Lending LLC joint venture operations
catalysts.sentence: Capstone Lending LLC, a Delaware limited liability company, formed as a joint venture (Capstone Lending) between us and an institutional partner (the JV Partner), commenced operations on January 2, 2026 and operates under a limited liability company agreement.

catalysts.event: Acquisition of portfolio by Capstone Lending
catalysts.sentence: On February 19, 2026, Capstone Lending acquired a portfolio of directly originated senior secured term loans issued by U.S. middle-market companies in which private equity sponsors have a controlling equity stake in the portfolio company with aggregate principal of $372.8 million.

catalysts.event: Entry into JV Credit Facility by Capstone Lending
catalysts.sentence: On February 19, 2026, Capstone Lending entered into a senior secured revolving credit facility (the JV Credit Facility) with a third party lender, providing for total commitments of up to $500,000.

catalysts.event: Board approval of share repurchase program
catalysts.sentence: On February 26, 2026, our Board approved a share repurchase program under which we can repurchase up to $100 million in the aggregate of our Common Stock at prices below our net asset value per share over a 24-month period, in accordance with all applicable securities laws and regulations.

tamClaims.claim: According to Preqin, private credit’s share of the sub-investment grade credit market, relative to the high yield and syndicated loan markets, has increased from 3% in 2010 to 25% as of June 30, 2025.
tamClaims.sentence: According to Preqin, private credit’s share of the sub-investment grade credit market, relative to the high yield and syndicated loan markets, has increased from 3% in 2010 to 25% as of June 30, 2025.

tamClaims.claim: data from Preqin shows that global private equity managers currently have over $1.1 trillion of raised, but not yet invested, capital
tamClaims.sentence: In addition, data from Preqin shows that global private equity managers currently have over $1.1 trillion of raised, but not yet invested, capital, representing a sizeable pool of support for both new and existing investments.

tamClaims.claim: Recent data from LSEG LPC indicates that there were more than $657 billion of middle-market loans with maturities between the first quarter of 2026 and the third quarter of 2031 that will likely require a refinancing event.
tamClaims.sentence: Recent data from LSEG LPC, a premier global provider of information on the syndicated loan and high yield bond markets, indicates that there were more than $657 billion of middle-market loans with maturities between the first quarter of 2026 and the third quarter of 2031 that will likely require a refinancing event.
